author: Roger T. Ames
title: Reflections on Lao Sze-Kwang and His Double-Structured “Intra-Cultural” Philosophy of Culture
research_area: 方法論與中國哲學合法性問題
notes: 正式資料第一篇。本文處理勞思光如何由黑格爾文化哲學轉向 double-structured theory，並討論為何不宜將其簡化為 Chinese philosopher 或 New Confucian。

author: Cunshan Li
title: The Heaven-Earth Cosmic Faith and the Universality of Confucian Ethics
